action_set_definitions.name: get_property_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current metrics for a specific hotel property, including inventory, pricing, and revenue.

property_id.description: The unique ID of the property (e.g., 'DP-99').

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_intelligence
action_set_definitions.description: Queries competitive market data for a specific property to assist in pricing strategy.

property_id.description: The unique ID of the competitor property (e.g., 'PS-99').

action_set_definitions.name: update_pricing
action_set_definitions.description: Sets a new room rate for the property. Note: Calling this for DP-99 for the first time will automatically convert 20 'Out of Order' rooms into sellable inventory.

property_id.description: The unique ID of the property.

new_rate.description: The new room rate to apply.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_day
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the transition to the next day. This calculates daily revenue based on the current price and market demand, updates cumulative revenue, and increments the day counter.

property_id.description: The unique ID of the property.

state_description.current_day: The current day in the simulation, typically ranging from 0 to 365.
state_description.total_inventory: Total number of rooms available in the hotel.
state_description.remaining_inventory: Number of rooms currently available for sale for the target date.
state_description.current_price: The current price set for a room unit.
state_description.cumulative_revenue: Total revenue generated from bookings up to the current day.
state_description.demand_multiplier: An internal factor representing market demand strength (e.g., 1.0 is baseline, 1.5 is high season).
